name: xau-state-discord
description: Quantitative XAUUSD analysis Discord broadcaster with static level grid and multi-factor scoring.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --test-isolation=none dist/config.test.js dist/runtime/market-hours.test.js dist/data/bar-builder.test.js dist/data/market-data-hub.test.js dist/events/event-calendar.test.js dist/analysis/score-semantics.test.js dist/discord/source-health.test.js dist/sidecars/pepperstone-ctrader-fix/ctrader-fix-client.test.js dist/sidecars/tradovate/tradovate-client.test.js dist/sidecars/common/jsonl-writer.test.js dist/sidecars/common/redaction.test.js dist/scripts/check-data-ingest.test.js
